zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Berkeley於大約1162年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾度斯利時，她的父親Roger de Berkeley32歲，母親Helena FitzHarding40歲。她於1182年與William de Waleran在英國維爾爾波登哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1215年在英國威爾斯享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Berkeley于大约1162年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾度斯利时，她的父亲Roger de Berkeley32岁，母亲Helena FitzHarding40岁。她于1182年与William de Waleran在英国維爾爾波登哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1215年在英国威尔斯享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Berkeley was born about 1162, in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Roger de Berkeley, was 32 and her mother, Helena FitzHarding, was 40. She married William de Waleran in 1182, in Bodenham, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1215, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Berkeley est née environ 1162, à Dursley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Berkeley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Helena FitzHarding, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé William de Waleran en 1182, à Bodenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1215, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Berkeley um 1162 in Dursley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Berkeley 32 und ihre Mutter Helena FitzHarding 40. Sie hat 1182 in Bodenham, Wiltshire, England William de Waleran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1215 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Berkeley è nata il circa 1162 nel Dursley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Roger de Berkeley, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Helena FitzHarding, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato William de Waleran nel 1182, nel Bodenham, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1215, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Berkeleyが約1162年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダルスリーで生まれた時，父Roger de Berkeleyは32歳，母Helena FitzHardingは40歳であった。1182年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアボデンハムでWilliam de Waleranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1215年にイギリスウェールズで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Berkeley(이)가 대략 1162년 영국 그루스스터실르 뒤르슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Berkeley(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena FitzHarding(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1182년 영국 윌츠히르 보데함에서 William de Waleran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 영국 웨일스에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1162, em Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Berkeley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Helena FitzHarding, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Waleran em 1182, em Bodenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1215, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Berkeley родилась около 1162 г. в местности дурсли, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Berkeley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Helena FitzHarding, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Waleran в 1182 г. в местности боденам, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1215 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

sm.Abt 1162–Abt 1215: e tusa o le 1162–e tusa o le 1215

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1162, en Dursley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Berkeley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Helena FitzHarding, tenía 40 años. Se casó con William de Waleran en 1182, en Bodenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1215, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
